FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_FAITH_CARD.title: Blade of Faith
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_FAITH_CARD.descriptio: Retain. Can only be played during Requiescat Prayer. Deal !D! damage to the target enemy and !OtherDamage! damage to all other enemies. Transform into Blade of Truth and place it on top of your draw pile.
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_HONOR_CARD.title: Blade of Honor
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_HONOR_CARD.descriptio: Retain. Can only be played during Requiescat Prayer. Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. End Requiescat Prayer.
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_TRUTH_CARD.title: Blade of Truth
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_TRUTH_CARD.descriptio: Retain. Can only be played during Requiescat Prayer. Deal !D! damage to the target enemy and !OtherDamage! damage to all other enemies. Transform into Blade of Valor and place it on top of your draw pile.
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_VALOR_CARD.title: Blade of Valor
FF14COMBO-BLADE_OF_VALOR_CARD.descriptio: Retain. Can only be played during Requiescat Prayer. Deal !D! damage to the target enemy and !OtherDamage! damage to all other enemies. Transform into Blade of Honor and place it on top of your draw pile.
FF14COMBO-CIRCLE_OF_SCORN_CARD.title: Circle of Scorn
FF14COMBO-CIRCLE_OF_SCORN_CARD.descripti: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Apply !WeakPower! Weak and !BleedingPower! Bleeding to ALL enemies.
FF14COMBO-DEFEND_KNIGHT_CARD.title: Defend
FF14COMBO-FAST_BLADE_CARD.title: Fast Blade
FF14COMBO-FAST_BLADE_CARD.description: Deal !D! damage. Gain 2 Vigor. Gain 1 Combo.
FF14COMBO-FIGHT_OR_FIGHT_CARD.title: Fight-or-flight Response
FF14COMBO-JUST_BEAT_IT_CARD.title: Just Beat It
FF14COMBO-JUST_BEAT_IT_CARD.description: Can only be played if you have at least 3 Combo. Convert 3 Combo into 6 Vigor.
FF14COMBO-GORING_BLADE_CARD.title: Goring Blade
FF14COMBO-PRECISION_COMBO_CARD.title: Precision Combo
FF14COMBO-PRECISION_COMBO_CARD.descripti: When consecutively played Attacks follow a *Single-target Combo* or *Area-target Combo*, the later Attack deals 50% more damage.
FF14COMBO-RAGE_OF_HALONE_CARD.title: Rage of Halone
FF14COMBO-RAGE_OF_HALONE_CARD.descriptio: Deal !D! damage. Gain 1 Combo. Gain 4 Vigor.
FF14COMBO-REDEMPTION_SWORD_CARD.title: Redemption Sword
FF14COMBO-REDEMPTION_SWORD_CARD.descript: Deal !D! damage. At the start of your next turn, deal damage to that enemy equal to the HP lost by ALL players this turn.
FF14COMBO-REQUIESCAT_CARD.title: Requiescat
FF14COMBO-REQUIESCAT_CARD.description: Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. Apply !WeakPower! Weak and !VulnerablePower! Vulnerable to ALL enemies. Gain !RequiescatPrayerPower! Requiescat Prayer. Transform into Blade of Faith and add it to your hand.
FF14COMBO-RIOT_BLADE_CARD.title: Riot Blade
FF14COMBO-RIOT_BLADE_CARD.description: Deal !D! damage. Gain 2 Vigor. Gain 1 Combo.
FF14COMBO-STRIKE_KNIGHT_CARD.title: Strike
